title: juncus minimus
intro: Juncus minimus, also known as Dwarf Rush, is a small, perennial plant species belonging to the Juncaceae family. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, primarily due to the presence of bioactive compounds like flavonoids and phenolic acids. The health benefits of Juncus minimus include its potential anti-inflammatory and antioxidant activities, which may aid in managing conditions such as arthritis and oxidative stress. Juncus minimus can be prepared into herbal infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, although further research is needed to fully explore its potential medicinal applications.
